reasoning: Provide a concise summary of the article, highlighting Gutierrez's cancer diagnosis and treatment, his return to Newcastle United, his contract situation, his thoughts on the future, and notable personal details mentioned (support from teammates, armband moment, tattoo).
output: Argentine winger Jonas Gutierrez spoke in Football Focus about his cancer battle, including the removal of a tumour from his left testicle in September 2014 and subsequent chemotherapy. He made his return to Newcastle United’s first team as a substitute in the 1-0 defeat to Manchester United on March 4. Now out of contract in the summer, he says his priority is to play regularly for the rest of the season and to remain in England in the Premier League, though his future remains unclear. Gutierrez described the emotional support from his teammates and the significance of wearing the armband against United. He also revealed he wanted a tattoo to mark his recovery, featuring the Eminem lyric: “I am alive again, more alive than I have been in my whole entire life.” The full interview airs on Football Focus at 11:30 GMT on Saturday.
